# RS Auto 24

> Professional auto maintenance, repair and tire change workshop in Iru, near Tallinn, Estonia.

## About

RS Auto 24 is a trusted automotive workshop offering comprehensive vehicle maintenance, repair, and tire change services. Located at Saha-Loo tee 1a, Iru, near Tallinn, Estonia.

## Services

- Auto maintenance & repair (30 €/h)
- Tire change (from 30 € for 4 tires)
- Battery replacement
- Chassis inspection
- Preparation for technical inspection
- Going to inspection (we take your car)
- Reading fault codes (free if repaired on-site)
- New spare parts supply and installation
- New tire sales and installation

## Contact

- Phone: +372 5638 0701
- Email: rsauto244@gmail.com
- Address: Saha-Loo tee 1a, Iru, Estonia
- Facebook: RSauto24
- Opening hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00

## Website

- Estonian: https://rsauto24.ee/
- English: https://rsauto24.ee/en.html
